report_metadata.note: This report is machine-generated from live validation data. Do not edit manually.

health_narrative: Score 70/100 — System is generally healthy but has 1 high-severity and 0 medium-severity issues requiring attention.
top_violations: [CRITICAL] The 'extracted_fact_confidence' field in 'week3-document-refinery-extractions' failed its range check. Found: min=50.0000, max=99.0000, mean=75.3067. Expected: min>=0.0, max<=1.0. Affecting 150 record(s). Downstream systems at risk: check contract_registry/subscriptions.yaml for affected systems.

[HIGH] The 'extracted_fact_confidence' field in 'week3-document-refinery-extractions' failed its statistical_drift check. Found: current_mean=75.3067, z_score=796.98. Expected: z_score < 2 (baseline_mean=0.8415, stddev=0.0934). Affecting 0 record(s). Downstream systems at risk: check contract_registry/subscriptions.yaml for affected systems.

Contract 'week1-intent-records': 3 schema change(s) detected (0 breaking). Verdict: BACKWARD_COMPATIBLE. No action required.
Contract 'week3-document-refinery-extractions': 2 schema change(s) detected (0 breaking). Verdict: BACKWARD_COMPATIBLE. No action required.
Contract 'week4-lineage-snapshots': 1 schema change(s) detected (0 breaking). Verdict: BACKWARD_COMPATIBLE. No action required.
Contract 'week5-event-records': 6 schema change(s) detected (0 breaking). Verdict: BACKWARD_COMPATIBLE. No action required.

ai_risk_assessment.narrative: Embedding drift baseline established on current data. First drift measurement will be available on the next run. LLM output schema violation rate is 0.0% — all verdict records conform to expected PASS/FAIL/WARN enum. LangSmith trace schema check passed: 210 traces validated, all required fields present and timestamps valid.

recommended_actions: URGENT: Fix CRITICAL violation in week3-document-refinery-extractions. Field 'extracted_fact_confidence' has value min=50.0000, max=99.0000, mean=75.3067 but contract requires min>=0.0, max<=1.0. Source: outputs/week3/extractions.jsonl (produced by src/week3/extractor.py). Run: python contracts/runner.py --contract generated_contracts/week3-document-refinery-extractions.yaml --data outputs/ --mode ENFORCE after fix.

Add contracts/runner.py as a required CI step before any data pipeline deployment. Insert: 'python contracts/runner.py --contract generated_contracts/<contract>.yaml --data outputs/<week>/ --mode ENFORCE --output validation_reports/ci_check.json' into your GitHub Actions workflow. This prevents violations from reaching production.

Embedding drift baseline has been established. Run 'python contracts/ai_extensions.py --extractions outputs/week3/extractions.jsonl --verdicts outputs/week2/verdicts.jsonl --output validation_reports/ai_extensions.json' again on next data batch to detect any semantic drift from this baseline.

all_failures.message: 'extracted_fact_confidence' range violation: max=99.0000 > 1.0. Likely cause: scale changed from 0.0-1.0 to 0-100.
'extracted_fact_confidence' statistical drift: 797.0 stddev drift. Was 0.8415, now 75.3067. Possible scale change!
